statusPolicy: Any blocking predicate that is not exact PASS/0 keeps the overall plan REOPENED / NOT COMPLETE.

predicates.description: Retired erroneous governance authorization assets are absent from the frozen tracked-file universe, with only negative or historical references allowed.

allowlist.value: formal rules, negative fixtures, retrospective prose
allowlist.reason: These locations may name a retired asset only to reject or audit it; they do not authorize changes.

commands: ! (for repo in .codex-worktrees/edge-startup-exception-retirement-closure .codex-worktrees/cloud-cache-001 .codex-worktrees/ai-phase0-closeout; do git -C "$repo" ls-files; done | rg '(^|/)(CODEOWNERS|governance-authorization\.md|test-governance-authorization\.md|测试治理授权\.md|governance-authorization\.json)$')

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md

predicates.description: Edge retired diecut inputs have zero active matches outside the exact two-file governance allowlist and all regenerable output directories are absent.

allowlist.reason: The single immutable retirement ledger contains exactly 41 declarations.
The executable gate must name the retired feature to reject its return.

commands: test "$(find .codex-worktrees/edge-startup-exception-retirement-closure -type d \( -name .vs -o -name bin -o -name obj -o -name artifacts -o -name .artifacts -o -name publish -o -name staging \) -prune -print | wc -l | tr -d ' ')" = 0

expectation.threshold: evidence=1 declarations=41 allowedMatches=2 unexpected=0 behavior positive=1 negative=8 generatedDirectoryCount=0

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md

predicates.description: Edge host and SDK test seams use the neutral TestPlugin lifecycle, completion and cancellation contract.

allowlist.reason: Production-module-specific behavior remains in its own module runner and is not the host/SDK neutral seam.

commands: jq -e '[.projects[] | select(.project == "IIoT.Edge.Module.ConformanceTests")][0] | .discovered == 77 and .executed == 77 and .passed == 77 and .failed == 0 and .skipped == 0' artifacts/testing/closure/source-reports/edge/required-summary.json

predicates.description: Every discovered test case has one complete native classification and required/manual reconciliation is exact in each repository inventory.

allowlist.reason: They remain classified and inventoried but are excluded from required execution by explicit cadence/runtime policy.

commands: jq -e '(.projects | length) == 25 and (.cases | length) == 1026 and ([.cases[] | select(.required == true)] | length) == 1012 and ([.cases[] | select(.required != true)] | length) == 14' artifacts/testing/closure/source-reports/ai/test-inventory.json

expectation.threshold: unique case identity; complete metadata; declared=discovered; required+manual=all

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md

predicates.description: Retired mixed test buckets, hiding filters and duplicate helper forms are absent or fail-closed under the frozen repository-native gates.

allowlist.reason: A helper used by one test class remains intentionally local.

allowlist.value: registered support project with evaluated runner consumers and no test cases
allowlist.reason: Shared test infrastructure is allowed only when the inventory proves consumers and separation.
The rejected form must appear in a fixture to prove fail-closed behavior.

details.duplicateHelperDefinition: Equivalent test-only behavior copied into at least two active files in one repository, unless class-local/private or governed by the production/support/test-case duplication baseline and ratchet.

commands: jq -e '.closedUniverses.legacyTestArchitecture.result == "PASS" and (.closedUniverses.legacyTestArchitecture.denylist.buckets | length) == 6 and (.closedUniverses.legacyTestArchitecture.denylist.filters | length) == 3 and (.closedUniverses.legacyTestArchitecture.denylist.helpers | length) == 3' artifacts/testing/closure/final-static-audit.json

expectation.threshold: denylist zero in active graph; each injected forbidden fixture exits non-zero; no ratchet regression

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md

predicates.description: Each final candidate required run has exact discovered, executed and passed equality, zero failed and skipped cases, and a run head bound to the clean candidate.

allowlist.value: Cloud optional full-end-to-end and mutation jobs
allowlist.reason: Workflow job SKIPPED is distinct from required test-case skip and is not part of the final PR required lane.

denylist: same-SHA rerun used to overwrite first failure

commands: jq -e '([.projects[].discovered] | add) == 1332 and ([.projects[].executed] | add) == 1332 and ([.projects[].passed] | add) == 1332 and ([.projects[].failed] | add) == 0 and ([.projects[].skipped] | add) == 0' artifacts/testing/closure/source-reports/edge/required-summary.json

jq -e 'all(.repositories[]; .clean == true and .pullRequest.state == "OPEN" and .pullRequest.draft == true and .pullRequest.headOid == .head and .run.attempt == 1 and .run.headSha == .head and .run.conclusion == "success")' artifacts/testing/closure/final-ci-bindings.json

predicates.description: Analyzer, project-graph and static-policy positive fixtures pass while the complete negative fixture sets fail closed in each required run.

roots: Cloud analyzer fixtures and nine metadata identities

allowlist.reason: A negative fixture intentionally contains the forbidden dependency or suppression form and must fail only under the expected reason.

commands: rg -x 'ARCHITECTURE_FIXTURES_OK valid=8 invalid=15 callGraphBypass=20 suppressionBypass=3 contractsMetadataIdentities=9 diagnostics=CLOUDARCH001,CLOUDARCH002,CLOUDARCH003,CLOUDARCH004,CLOUDARCH005,CLOUDARCH006,CLOUDARCH007,CLOUDARCH008,CLOUDARCH009,CLOUDARCH010' artifacts/testing/closure/source-reports/cloud/architecture-fixtures.log

expectation.threshold: Cloud identities=9 valid=8 invalid=15 callGraphBypass=20 suppressionBypass=3; all repository-native fixture gates pass

predicates.description: The closed high-risk semantic identity matrix binds every listed identity to tests, runners, final results and candidate heads.

allowlist.value: identities outside the frozen high-risk matrix
allowlist.reason: They remain covered by the complete native inventory but are not promoted to this closed high-risk subset without a formal catalog change.

denylist: identity without exact run and HEAD

commands: jq -e '(.highRiskIdentityMatrix | length) == 10 and ([.highRiskIdentityMatrix[].identity] | unique | length) == 10 and all(.highRiskIdentityMatrix[]; (.test | length) > 0 and (.runner | length) > 0 and .result == "PASS" and (.run == 29558380849 or .run == 29562419923 or .run == 29562903935) and (.head | length) == 40)' artifacts/testing/closure/final-static-audit.json

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md
rules.gate: highRiskIdentityMatrix completeness check in closure validator

predicates.description: The TestKind, Runtime, Capability and ProjectReference matrix assigns tests to their real failure layer and rejects illegal dependency graphs.

allowlist.reason: A support dependency is allowed only for the runner whose declared runtime requires it and whose inventory proves the evaluated consumer graph.

details.capability: exactly one registered runner capability per case
details.projectReference: evaluated transitive project/package graph is checked against runtime and TestKind

commands: jq -e '.failureLayerMatrix.result == "PASS" and (.failureLayerMatrix.testKinds | length) == 12 and (.failureLayerMatrix.runtimes | length) == 13 and (.failureLayerMatrix.projectReferenceRules | length) == 5 and (.failureLayerMatrix.negativeFixtureGates | length) == 3' artifacts/testing/closure/final-static-audit.json

expectation.threshold: all inventory cases classified; every injected illegal graph exits non-zero

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md

predicates.description: Coverage, mutation, duplication and compatibility baselines retain explicit thresholds and are bound to the final candidate heads and runs without relaxation.

roots: Edge quality baselines and final artifacts
Cloud quality baselines and final artifacts
AI quality baselines and final artifacts

allowlist.reason: The formal Edge baseline records report-only mutation metrics and may not be generalized to a full-repository 100% gate.

allowlist.value: Cloud final optional mutation job skipped
allowlist.reason: The cadence mutation baseline remains explicit; the required final lane does not mislabel the optional job as executed.
Cross-repository duplication is report-only; each repository's own baseline/ratchet remains blocking.

denylist: quality report bound to stale candidate
Cloud compatibility consumer source drift accepted

commands: jq -e '(.externalConsumerEvidence | length) == 2 and all(.externalConsumerEvidence[]; .verified == true and .repositoryClean == true and .evidenceHead == "7474b3a919d8e0058ac529fdda6e2d0cd720390d")' artifacts/testing/closure/source-reports/cloud/compatibility.json

expectation.threshold: all repository ratchets pass; no baseline relaxation; Cloud compatibility bound to final clean Edge source state

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md
rules.gate: repository quality ratchets + final CI bindings

predicates.description: Final candidate required runs stay within the 1500-second nearest-rank p95 target without reducing required test counts or introducing required skips.

allowlist.value: one final candidate sample per repository
allowlist.reason: The small sample limits statistical extrapolation but not the exact nearest-rank calculation over the explicitly listed final runs.

commands: jq -e '.latency.p95Seconds == 1372 and .latency.thresholdSeconds == 1500 and .latency.passed == true and all(.latency.testCountRegression[]; .reduced == false)' artifacts/testing/closure/final-ci-bindings.json

expectation.threshold: p95<=1500 seconds; Edge>=1280; Cloud>=661; AI>=1011; required skipped=0

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md

predicates.description: Provider, consumer, contract digest and local workspace acceptance execute serially in Release against the same clean three-candidate set with no production operation.

allowlist.reason: WorkspaceAlignment may start isolated local test resources but cannot access production or LiveExternal.

commands: jq -e '.authoritative == true and .configuration == "Release" and .noBuild == false and .productionOperations == false and .deployChangedInvoked == false and all(.repositories[]; .clean == true) and ([.stages[] | select(.failed != null) | .failed] | add) == 0 and ([.stages[] | select(.skipped != null) | .skipped] | add) == 0' artifacts/testing/non-production-joint-acceptance/non-production-joint-acceptance.json

expectation.threshold: Release; noBuild=false; provider=47 consumer=87 workspace=1; failed=skipped=0; productionOperations=deployChangedInvoked=false

predicates.description: The unique rule catalog maps every closure predicate to formal current rules and executable gates; retrospective and history files are never the sole source.

roots: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md
Edge docs/客户端规则.md and Edge架构边界契约.md

allowlist.reason: Retrospectives remain trace evidence only and may supplement, but never replace, a formal rule and executable gate.

formalLocations: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md

expectation.threshold: exactly one catalog; 14 unique predicates; every rule resolves to formal non-history path and nonempty gate

rules.formalLocation: docs/三项目测试架构治理总计划.md

predicates.description: External, physical, LiveExternal and production operations remain explicitly unexecuted, while all candidate pull requests stay Draft, open and unmerged and evidence PR triggers cannot invoke production workflows.

allowlist.value: required CI and local non-production acceptance
allowlist.reason: Automated test and local isolated acceptance are within authorization and are explicitly marked non-production.

commands: jq -e 'all(.repositories[]; .pullRequest.state == "OPEN" and .pullRequest.draft == true and .pullRequest.merged == false) and .workflowAudit.productionTriggeredByEvidencePullRequest == false and (.excludedOperations | length) == 10' artifacts/testing/closure/final-ci-bindings.json

jq -e '.externalBoundaries.pullRequestsMerged == false and .externalBoundaries.productionOperationsPerformed == false and .externalBoundaries.deployChangedInvoked == false and .externalBoundaries.result == "PASS"' artifacts/testing/closure/final-static-audit.json

expectation.threshold: all exclusions explicit; all three candidate PRs open Draft and unmerged; evidence PR cannot trigger production workflow
